name: Spicy Herbal Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the seeds from the cardamom pods.
2. Add the anise seeds and crush all the kernels with the back of a fork.
3. Place the crushed mixture in a 1-quart container along with chopped angelica root, cinnamon stick, clove, mace, and vodka.
4. Shake the mixture well and store it in a cupboard for one week.
5. Strain the liquid through cheesecloth several times.
6. Blend the strained liquid with sugar syrup until smooth.
7. Ready to serve.
